faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about my design process, services, and how we can work together.
faq.a1: I specialize in UI/UX design, branding, web design, and development. Whether you need a complete website, a visual identity, or design consultation, I'm here to help bring your ideas to life.
faq.q2: How does the design process work?
faq.a2: My process begins with discovery and planning, where I understand your goals and audience. Then, I move on to concept creation, revisions based on your feedback, and finalize with testing and delivery. It's a collaborative process, and I keep you updated every step of the way.
faq.q3: How long does a project usually take?
faq.a3: The timeline depends on the scope of the project. Smaller projects, like logo design, may take 1-2 weeks, while larger projects, such as website design, can take 4-6 weeks. I'll provide a detailed timeline once we've discussed your needs.
faq.q4: What do I need to provide before starting a project?
faq.a4: Typically, I'll need information about your business, your goals, and any branding assets you already have, like a logo or color palette. For web projects, content like text and images will also be required. Don't worry—I'll guide you through this step.
faq.a5: Yes, revisions are part of my process to ensure the final design meets your expectations. I usually include 2-3 rounds of revisions depending on the project. Additional revisions can be arranged if needed.
faq.a6: Simply reach out through my contact page or email me directly. We'll schedule a consultation to discuss your project, goals, and timeline. From there, I'll provide a proposal to get things moving.
